summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was invented. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is safe in this job: instant close, low-signal close, merge, and fix PR lanes are disabled, and several items require maintainer or product judgment. Security-sensitive linked PR #56442 is quarantined only for central security handling; it does not block unrelated non-security classification.

actions.reason: Focused, proofed contributor bug-fix PR should remain open for maintainer review; this inventory job cannot merge or repair it.
Keep open as the implementation candidate for #50245; proof/check blockers require maintainer follow-up.
The PR is a plausible narrow candidate for the ACP heartbeat-disabled seam, but conflicts, missing real behavior proof, and architecture/product scope require human review.
Docs content is not low-signal enough for automated close; the core decision is maintainer product policy.
Maintainer-authored draft PR with maintainer signal must stay in human review; no automated close or merge is allowed.
Keep open as the issue tracked by the open implementation candidate; closeout is not permitted before the PR path resolves.
Keep open as the issue family for #60402 and broader yielded-parent follow-up; not a duplicate or safe close target.
Security-sensitive linked ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security triage without poisoning unrelated non-security items.
Closed context refs are evidence only; no mutation is valid.
Related performance/metadata issue, but not a duplicate of the inventory PRs and the linked implementation ref is unhydrated.
Keep open as the issue tracked by the proofed open PR #90819 until maintainers resolve that PR path.

needs_human: #90819: maintainer review required for proofed focused gateway performance PR; merge is blocked by job policy.
#60402: maintainer architecture/proof decision required for ACP heartbeat-disabled wake fix with conflicts and failed real-behavior proof.
#87627: maintainer product/support-boundary decision required for first-party docs listing of commercial third-party hardware.
#87695: maintainer-owned draft PR requires maintainer review and cannot be closed or merged by this inventory job.
